author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Allosaurus was a massive carnivorous dinosaur that lived during the Late Jurassic period, around 155 to 145 million years ago.
Allosaurus was a top predator of its ecosystem, equipped with dozens of sharp, serrated teeth and large, powerful claws.
